title: read_verilog does not accept module port lists with .port_identifier

features.name: module port list with named port connections using dot syntax
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with port connections using .port_identifier syntax where ports are connected by name using the (.name(expr), .name(expr)) format
features.snippet: module m (.a(x), .b(y)); inout x; inout y; endmodule
